x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Beneficiary
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The party who uses the incentives.

Comment:
Example: Customer redeeming points.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Funding Party
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The entity that finances the redeemed value.

Comment:
Example: Bank funding cashback payout.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Processing System
x-enumeration-literals.description: The system that validates eligibility, deducts incentives, and processes redemption.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Fulfillment Party
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The entity delivering the redeemed benefit.

Comment:
Example: Merchant issuing voucher, airline receiving transferred miles.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Validator
x-enumeration-literals.description: The entity confirming eligibility and sufficient balance before burn.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Burn Settlement Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: The entity responsible for liability reduction and financial posting.
